name: Lemon Nutmeg Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cornstarch, sugar, and lemon peel in the top of a double boiler.
2. Gradually blend in water. Stir over low heat until thickened.
3. Cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, using only hot water on the bottom.
4. Remove from heat; add remaining ingredients.
5. Stir until butter melts.
